expectations.text: Tier 1 sources present (guidelines, landmark trials, or textbooks cited)

expectations.text: Convergence/divergence content present naturally in output
expectations.evidence: Section 1.4 'Convergencias e Divergencias' with detailed comparison. Section 7 'Equivocos e Conflitos na Literatura Medica' with specific examples

expectations.text: 2+ concrete numbers with sources (%, NNT, n=)

expectations.text: No unsourced claims (no 'estudos mostram' without citation)
expectations.evidence: All claims cite specific study or authority. Some empirical studies note 'Sem PMID identificavel' but study is named
